evidence.description: Reviewed lines 1-132. No import of editingSessionChannel; no call to subscribeEditingSessionState; no import of createBlockEditorAdapter; no editingSessionState/blockEditorAdapter prop passed to FeedList. Required by REQ-FEED-029 / REQ-FEED-030 and verification-architecture §14 line 757.
Reviewed lines 1-50, 373-391. Props interface omits editingSessionState/blockEditorAdapter; FeedRow mount block does not forward them. Required by verification-architecture §14 line 754.

Reviewed lines 1-315, 448-471. `{#if shouldMountBlocks && blockEditorAdapter}` mount gate cannot fire when blockEditorAdapter is null in production; defaults to null when no caller provides it (line 59).
PROP-FEED-S5-019 implementation does not actually exercise the EC-FEED-019 double-click race; it pre-sets switching state and dispatches a single click (regression coverage for REQ-FEED-006 only).
PROP-FEED-S5-009 needsEmptyParagraphFallback equivalence-class coverage (null/undefined/[]/non-empty) is solid; pure-helper edge cases are well covered.

PROP-FEED-S5-011 (a)/(b)/(c)/(d)/(e) idempotency scenarios appear to drive the FeedRow $effect correctly via FeedRowSprint5Wrapper, but only at the FeedRow-instance level — the EC-FEED-018 (filter exclusion + cache restore) test only models unmount/remount continuity at the row level, not the upstream-cache continuity required when FeedList controls the editingSessionState slice (which it does not — see FIND-S5-PHASE3-001).
needsEmptyParagraphFallback is correct, total, side-effect-free; matches PROP-FEED-S5-009 contract.

subscribeEditingSessionState handler is synchronous (no await/.then/setTimeout/queueMicrotask inside the listen callback); INBOUND only (no invoke import). Implementation correct — but the wiring layer never calls it, so its correctness is academic in production (see FIND-S5-PHASE3-001).

Factory implements all 16 methods with the documented Tauri command names and includes issuedAt in every payload. Matches REQ-FEED-030 command-mapping table. Implementation correct in isolation — but no caller instantiates it (see FIND-S5-PHASE3-001).

$effect logic for fallback restart conditions appears correct: blocksPresent path resets fallbackAppliedFor and sets lastBlocksWasNonEmpty=true; absent-path restart honors (i) null state, (ii) noteId switch, (iii) prior non-empty cycle. Best-effort dispatch chain wraps both await calls in try/catch. Note: the dispatch payload omits the client-generated UUID (FIND-S5-PHASE3-004 — spec inconsistency the implementation cannot resolve unilaterally).

Audit script enforces PROP-FEED-S5-001/002/003/004/012/014/015/017/021 correctly: forbidden identifiers, single listener location, INBOUND-only channel, 16 invokes with matching command set, src/lib/editor/ absence.
Single-column layout implemented (REQ-FEED-028); .feed-main wrapper, no grid-template-columns, height: 100vh present. CRIT-200 grep portion satisfied.

Spec internally inconsistent: REQ-FEED-031 step 5 dispatches `{ noteId, newBlock: { id, block_type, content }, issuedAt }` while REQ-FEED-030 command-mapping requires `{ noteId, type, content, issuedAt }`. Implementation chose the type-conforming shape; spec should be reconciled (FIND-S5-PHASE3-004).
All cells of PROP-FEED-S5-006/007/008/018 mount FeedRow.svelte directly with hand-supplied props, bypassing FeedList and +page.svelte; integration with the wiring layer is not verified.
PROP-FEED-S5-010/011 sub-scenarios (a)-(e) verify FeedRow's local $effect logic via FeedRowSprint5Wrapper but do not exercise the upstream subscriber path.
PROP-FEED-S5-005 directly imports subscribeEditingSessionState and asserts its behavior; never asserts that FeedList or +page.svelte invokes it. PROP-FEED-S5-020 has the same gap.
Source-grep portion of CRIT-200 confirms forbidden-identifier absence; no positive-presence assertion that subscribeEditingSessionState or createBlockEditorAdapter is called.

criteriaResults.rationale: +page.svelte single-column layout, height:100vh, no forbidden identifiers; main-route.dom.vitest.ts source structure assertions pass.

Listener exists exactly once in editingSessionChannel.ts and is async-free, but no production caller invokes subscribeEditingSessionState — REQ-FEED-029 'production listener mounted in +page.svelte or FeedList' is not satisfied.

FeedRow embeds BlockElement when given the props, but production wiring never supplies blockEditorAdapter; the mount gate `shouldMountBlocks && blockEditorAdapter` never fires in production. REQ-FEED-030 unmet.
needsEmptyParagraphFallback pure helper is correct and the FeedRow $effect logic models REQ-FEED-031, but the fallback is unreachable in production for the same wiring reason.
Sprint-4 emit-order baseline preserved; editingSessionChannel handler is synchronous (PROP-FEED-S5-012 + S5-013 audit). REQ-FEED-032 emit ordering invariant intact.
Forbidden-identifier audit (PROP-FEED-S5-014) and src/lib/editor/ filesystem absence (PROP-FEED-S5-015) both clean per audit script.

Sub-assertions a/b/c/d operate against direct-mounted FeedRow with hand-injected blockEditorAdapter; none model production reality where blockEditorAdapter is null. The 'UI continues to function' guarantee is inapplicable when the surface never mounts in production.

PROP-FEED-S5-018 only checks row-level remount continuity, not the upstream cache the spec describes; PROP-FEED-S5-019 does not exercise an actual race; PROP-FEED-S5-020 imports the channel module directly. EC-FEED-018/019/020 coverage is shallow.
